business.name: Landhawk Drone Co.
business.tagline: Your land, watched over. Reported on. Always.

seo.default_meta_description: Autonomous drone surveillance for landowners, farmers, and ranchers. 24/7 property monitoring, AI-generated SMS reports, and full FAA compliance — nationwide.

pages.title: Autonomous Drone Surveillance for Farms, Ranches & Large Properties
pages.meta_description: Landhawk Drone Co. provides autonomous drone surveillance for landowners, farmers, and ranchers nationwide. 24/7 monitoring, AI SMS reports, trespassing detection, and FAA waiver handling. Book a free assessment.

pages.title: How Drone Surveillance Installation Works — From Assessment to Go-Live
pages.meta_description: See the complete 8-phase process for getting autonomous drone surveillance installed on your property. FAA filing, hardware setup, and go-live in 8–12 weeks.
